title: bromus rubens subsp. kunkelii
intro: Bromus rubens subsp. kunkelii, also known as Kunkel's brome, is a subspecies of the wild grass species Bromus rubens. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Kunkel's brome include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Bromus rubens subsp. kunkelii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
